prompt: Write a QLoRA training script for meta-llama/Llama-3.1-70B-Instruct. Use 4-bit NF4 with double quantization, bf16 compute dtype, gradient checkpointing enabled. LoRA: rank 32, alpha 64, target_modules covering q/k/v/o projections and gate/up/down projections. Use TRL SFTTrainer on a JSONL at ./data/curriculum.jsonl with a single 'text' column. 1 epoch, per-device batch 1, gradient accumulation 16, learning rate 1e-4, paged_adamw_32bit optimizer. Save adapter to ./out/lamarck-g1.

criteria.description: Runs 1 epoch on 10 synthetic samples without raising

reference_solution:
from datasets import load_dataset
from peft import LoraConfig, PeftModel, prepare_model_for_kbit_training
from transformers import (AutoModelForCausalLM, AutoTokenizer,
                          BitsAndBytesConfig)
from trl import SFTConfig, SFTTrainer

model_id = 'meta-llama/Llama-3.1-70B-Instruct'
bnb = BitsAndBytesConfig(load_in_4bit=True, bnb_4bit_quant_type='nf4',
                         bnb_4bit_use_double_quant=True,
                         bnb_4bit_compute_dtype='bfloat16')
tokenizer = AutoTokenizer.from_pretrained(model_id)
if tokenizer.pad_token is None:
    tokenizer.pad_token = tokenizer.eos_token
model = AutoModelForCausalLM.from_pretrained(model_id, quantization_config=bnb,
                                             device_map='auto')
model = prepare_model_for_kbit_training(model)
model.gradient_checkpointing_enable()

ds = load_dataset('json', data_files='./data/curriculum.jsonl', split='train')

lora = LoraConfig(r=32, lora_alpha=64, lora_dropout=0.05,
                  target_modules=['q_proj','k_proj','v_proj','o_proj',
                                  'gate_proj','up_proj','down_proj'],
                  bias='none', task_type='CAUSAL_LM')
args = SFTConfig(output_dir='./out/lamarck-g1', per_device_train_batch_size=1,
                 gradient_accumulation_steps=16, num_train_epochs=1,
                 learning_rate=1e-4, bf16=True, optim='paged_adamw_32bit',
                 save_strategy='no')
trainer = SFTTrainer(model=model, args=args, train_dataset=ds,
                     peft_config=lora, tokenizer=tokenizer)
trainer.train()
trainer.model.save_pretrained('./out/lamarck-g1')
_ = PeftModel.from_pretrained(model, './out/lamarck-g1')
